must_distinguish.note: 慢 = adjective/predicate 'slow'; 慢慢 = adverb 'slowly/gradually' (also implies patience); 迟缓 = slow and sluggish (often negative, of reaction or movement).

cedict_en: to close (a door)/to turn off (light, electrical equipment etc)

must_distinguish.note: 关上 = close/shut (physical objects: door, window; also turn off); 闭幕 = close/end an event (ceremony, conference, exhibition — formal).

cedict_en: to flow/to disseminate/to circulate or spread/to move or drift/to degenerate/to banish or send into exile/stream of water or sth resembling one/class, rate or grade

must_distinguish.note: 流 = flow/stream (simple verb, tears, water, time); 流动 = flow/circulate (systemic ongoing movement — crowds, capital, liquids in systems)

cedict_en: to raise (animals)/to bring up (children)/to keep (pets)/to support/to give birth

must_distinguish.note: 养 = general raise/keep (children or pets); 饲养 = feed and raise animals (husbandry); 抚养 = raise and provide for children (legal/familial); 培养 = nurture/develop people or skills (education context)
接到 = receive a specific communication (call, letter); 接受 = accept/take in (implies willingness); 受到 = be subjected to / undergo (often impact or treatment); 受 = receive or endure (broad base verb)
绿 = green (basic color adjective); 绿色 = green (color noun; also metaphor for eco-friendly); 青 = blue-green (traditional color term, also means young/unripe)

cedict_en: to come across/to run into/to meet/to hit

must_distinguish.note: 碰到 = run into accidentally; 见 = to see/meet (neutral, general); 逢 = happen to meet, on a recurring occasion (literary); 会晤 = formal meeting (diplomatic/official)

cedict_en: south; southern direction/(in China) southern regions, often referring to areas south of the Yangtze River

must_distinguish.note: 南方 = the South as a cultural/geographic region (e.g. 南方人); 南部 = the southern portion of a specific territory or country (administrative sub-area)
游客 = tourist (sightseeing, leisure traveler); 旅客 = traveler/passenger (any traveler, incl. transit)
Both mean kilogram. 公斤 is the everyday spoken form; 千克 is the official SI/scientific term, used in technical and written contexts.
有点儿/有点 lean negative/complaint; 有一点儿 is neutral-emphatic; 稍微 is neutral and milder; 略微 is formal/literary

cedict_en: seemingly; apparently; looks as if; appears to be; gives the impression that; seems on the face of it to be

must_distinguish.note: All express 'seems/appears'; 好像 is colloquial and can also mean 'like'; 似乎 is more tentative and written; 看起来 is literal 'looking at it, it seems' — visual-based inference.
西部 = the western part/region (geographic section of a country or area); 西方 = the West (civilizational/cultural concept; also used in religion)
观看 = watch/view (entertainment, a performance, screen); 观察 = observe/study (with attention, scientific or investigative)

cedict_en: to broadcast/to air (a TV program etc)

must_distinguish.note: 播出 = to air/broadcast (a specific program, one-time output); 广播 = radio broadcasting as medium, or to broadcast generally (also a noun for radio).

meaning_ru: целых (усилит. о длит.: 整整三天)

must_distinguish.note: 全场 = whole audience/venue; 全部 (5k) = the total amount/all of it; 整 = exactly whole (整十年); 整整 = a full emphatic duration (整整三天); 整个 (5k) = the entire X as modifier; 整体 (5k) = the whole as a unified entity (noun).
华人 = any ethnic Chinese person (worldwide); 华裔 = person of Chinese descent born/raised abroad; 华侨 = Chinese national residing overseas (retains PRC/ROC citizenship)
积极性 = enthusiasm as an abstract capacity or quality (formal); 干劲 = work drive, practical zeal (colloquial); 劲头 = vigor or spirit in the moment (colloquial, vivid)

检测 = detect/measure (instrument or sensor); 检验 = inspect/test quality or validity; 检查 = routine check/inspection (medical or compliance); 测验 = classroom quiz or test; 考验 = life/moral ordeal, trial; 化验 = lab assay/analysis; 探测 = probe/detect remotely (instruments, space)

cedict_en: surname Gui/to return/to go back to/to give back to/(of a responsibility) to be taken care of by/to belong to/to gather together/(used between two identical verbs) despite/to marry (of a woman) (old)/division on the abacus with a one-digit divisor

must_distinguish.note: 返回 = go/travel back (neutral direction); 回来 = come back toward speaker; 归 = return to one's place/origin (literary) or belong to; 归还 = give back a borrowed object

cedict_en: surname Song/pine/CL:棵[ke1]/loose/to loosen/to relax/floss (dry, fluffy food product made from shredded, seasoned meat or fish, used as a topping or filling)

must_distinguish.note: 松 = loose/slack (state adjective, or verb: loosen); 放松 = relax/let go (deliberate action, often mental relaxation).

cedict_en: to scale (a height)/to ascend/to mount/to publish or record/to enter (e.g. in a register)/to press down with the foot/to step or tread on/to put on (shoes or trousers) (dialect)/to be gathered and taken to the threshing ground (old)

must_distinguish.note: 登山 = mountain climbing (sport/activity as a whole); 登 = ascend/climb (general, incl. stairs, stages); 攀登 = scale/climb (effort-intensive, figurative too: 攀登高峰).

cedict_en: to assemble; to gather (transitive or intransitive)/(chemistry) poly-

must_distinguish.note: 聚 = gather/assemble (people or things, naturally); 集合 = assemble (organised, commanded); 采集 = collect/harvest (specimens, data, natural resources); 收集 = gather/collect (items systematically); 收藏 = collect/keep (for pleasure or preservation — hobby)

挑选 = pick by personal preference (everyday shopping, choosing); 筛选 = screen/filter by criteria (systematic, analytical); 拣 = pick out by hand/visually (physical, informal); 选拔 = select the best candidates (competitive, talent-focused); 选择 = choose from options (general, neutral).

cedict_en: to defeat/to overpower/to beat/to be defeated

must_distinguish.note: 赢 = win (general, colloquial). 打败 = beat/defeat (an opponent, often physical contest). 战胜 = overcome/prevail over (battle or hardship, more formal/literary).

更换 = swap out (formal, objects); 替 = do something in place of someone; 替代 = substitute (abstract/systemic); 代替 = replace/act for (general); 换 = exchange or switch; 代 = act for + era/generation (multi-sense morpheme)
中奖 = win by chance (lottery, lucky draw); 获奖 = receive a merit-based award/prize; 赢 = win (competition, game — broadest)

中奖 = win a lottery/prize draw (chance); 获奖 = receive a formal award/prize (achievement); 赢得 = win/gain something through effort (takes an object: trust, title); 赢 = simply win a contest/game; 胜 = beat an opponent (verb, also adj 'superior'); 胜利 = victory (noun, often military/political)
平稳 = stable and even (no fluctuation, physical or abstract steadiness); 顺利 (5k) = going smoothly without obstacles or hitches (process succeeds as hoped)

货 = goods/cargo (general, incl. freight); 百货 = general merchandise (retail variety); 商品 = commodity (market economics term); 产品 = product (manufactured output); 物资 = supplies/materials (logistics, often strategic)
深 (5k) = physically deep or dark (color); 深厚 = deep and solid (feelings, foundation, skills); 深沉 (5k) = deeply reserved or brooding (personality/mood)

抄 = copy by hand / plagiarize. 抄写 = copy out by hand (deliberate transcription, study context). 复印 = photocopy (machine reproduction of document). 复制 = duplicate/replicate (digital or physical, broader).

cedict_en: to remain; to be left over

must_distinguish.note: 剩/剩下 = be left over after use/consumption; 残留 = linger on as a remnant or residue (often negative connotation: pollutant, trace)

cedict_en: old variant of 冒[mao4]/surname Mao/to emit; to give off; to send out (or up, forth)/to brave; to face/(bound form) reckless/to falsely adopt (sb's identity etc); to feign/(literary) to cover

must_distinguish.note: 发出 = emit/send out (sound, light, signals, notifications). 排放 = discharge/emit (pollutants, gases, industrial waste). 放射 = radiate (radiation, rays, spreading outward from a point). 冒 = emit/give off (smoke, steam, bubble up; also 'brave').
库 = warehouse/storehouse (single morpheme; often a suffix in compounds: 图书库, 数据库); 仓库 = warehouse (the standard standalone word)
到来 = arrival of events/seasons/eras (often abstract); 到达 = neutral physical arrival at a place; 抵达 = formal written arrival; 来到 = arrive toward the speaker/scene

聚 = gather/assemble (people or things, naturally); 集合 = assemble (organised, commanded); 采集 = collect/harvest (specimens, data, natural resources); 收集 = gather/collect (items systematically); 收藏 = collect/keep (for pleasure or preservation — hobby)

cedict_en: to sign (one's name with a pen etc)/to autograph/signature

must_distinguish.note: 签名 = personal autograph or casual signing; 签字 = official signature on a document; 签署 = formally sign (agreement/declaration); 签订 = conclude AND sign (a contract/treaty).
All involve sky/air. 空中 = mid-air/airspace (where planes fly); 天上 = up in the sky/heavens (celestial, poetic); 天空 = the sky as a visual expanse (noun); 太空 = outer space (beyond atmosphere).
随后 = immediately following in sequence (right after); 不久 = an unspecified short time later (temporal gap, not necessarily immediate)

cedict_en: to search/variant of 蒐|搜[sou1]/(bound form) to collect; to gather

must_distinguish.note: 搜/搜索 = search by scanning (physical search, internet); 寻找 = look for a specific target; 寻求 = seek/pursue (abstract goals, solutions); 寻觅 = search with longing (literary/emotional)
Both introduce a cause: 由于 = 'due to' (neutral, factual cause, can precede or follow the result clause); 出于 = 'out of' a motive or feeling (always introduces internal motivation, e.g. 出于好意)
隔/隔开 = separate by physical barrier or interval; 分开 = split apart (general, reversible); 分离 = separate with a sense of parting (often people/components); 分散 = scatter/disperse into multiple parts
搜/搜索 = search by scanning (physical search, internet); 寻找 = look for a specific target; 寻求 = seek/pursue (abstract goals, solutions); 寻觅 = search with longing (literary/emotional)

此刻 = 'this very moment' (literary/emotional, pinpoints an instant); 眼下 = 'right now' (spoken, informal); 目前 = 'at present' (neutral time adverb, written); 当前 = 'current/pressing now' (formal, implies urgency or importance of the present task).
兔 = literary/zodiac form, used in compounds (兔年); 兔子 = everyday colloquial word for rabbit/hare

大胆 = bold/daring (neutral to mildly pejorative — can imply recklessness); 勇于 = have the courage to do X (positive, always tied to a specific admirable action); 豪迈 = bold-spirited/heroic (literary, broad character trait)
偷偷 = secretly, concealing intent or action from others; 悄悄 = quietly, without noise — may or may not involve secrecy
减轻 = reduce the weight/burden/severity (measurable decrease); 缓解 = ease/relieve temporarily (symptoms, pressure); 缓和 = relax/defuse (tension, conflict, relations).

脸色 = facial color/complexion or mood-signaling look; 气色 (5k) = overall complexion/vitality; 神色 (5k) = expression/air (more literary); 神情 (5k) = mental/emotional look; 表情 (5k) = facial expression (deliberate/mimicked)

cedict_en: early period; early phase; early stage

must_distinguish.note: 早期 = relatively early stage (not necessarily the very beginning); 初期 = initial/opening stage (the very start); 初 = the beginning point itself; 阶段 = one phase in a development sequence; 时期 = a broader era or epoch
处罚 = penalize (administrative, fines); 惩罚 = punish (moral/disciplinary); 制裁 = sanctions (political/legal, formal register)

cedict_en: to flow; to circulate; to move about; mobile; (of assets) liquid

must_distinguish.note: 流 = flow/stream (simple verb, tears, water, time); 流动 = flow/circulate (systemic ongoing movement — crowds, capital, liquids in systems)
此后 = formal/written 'from this point onward; hereafter' (often opens a new phase); 之后 = general neutral 'after; afterwards' (everyday use)

cedict_en: to tear down/to demolish/to dismantle/to remove

must_distinguish.note: 拆 = dismantle/tear down (single action, physical). 拆除 = demolish/remove (official, often structural, typically permanent).

早期 = relatively early stage (not necessarily the very beginning); 初期 = initial/opening stage (the very start); 初 = the beginning point itself; 阶段 = one phase in a development sequence; 时期 = a broader era or epoch

cedict_en: early or late; first and last; priority/in succession; one after another

must_distinguish.note: All mean 'one after another'. 先后 stresses ordered sequence; 陆续 stresses a gradual continuous stream; 接连 stresses unbroken succession (no gap); 纷纷 stresses many acting simultaneously/in a rush (en masse).
合同 (5k) = contract (legally binding, commercial); 协议书 = written agreement (broader, may be less formal than a contract — MOUs, protocols).
通知书 = one-way written notice (authority → recipient); 协议书 = bilateral written agreement between parties
